name: Hextech Arcanum
description: A trippy, glowing geometric pattern of hexagons and runic energy streams inspired by Arcane.

schema.label: Hexagon Size
schema.description: Size of the individual hex cells.

schema.label: Energy Flow Speed
schema.description: How fast the runic energy pulses through the grid.

schema.label: Mana Streams
schema.description: Number of active energy streams flowing through the circuitry.

schema.label: Trippiness Factor
schema.description: How much the grid warps and distorts over time.
